commands.cmd: read-only intake/value/index, goal-history, allocation/calculation, profile preference, chart and performance inspection

summary: Designed a fixed five-query authorized workspace and exact server semantics for all remaining non-weight individual charts without a migration.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Scout exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted; the PM completed the same read-only design as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: A Judge must approve the correlated latest-revision SQL, diary-authorized historical goal context, planned aggregate join and exact five-chart Worker boundary.
Weight, card/planner flags, household analysis and rendered final evidence remain later tasks.
